title: Design and develop database solutions
summary: Learn to design and implement database objects, programmability objects, advanced T-SQL code, and AI-assisted tools for SQL Server, Azure SQL, and Microsoft Fabric.

sections.title: Design and develop database solutions
sections.summary: Learn to design and implement database objects, programmability objects, advanced T-SQL code, and AI-assisted tools for SQL Server, Azure SQL, and Microsoft Fabric.

lessons.title: Design and implement database objects with SQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to design and implement database objects in SQL Server, Azure SQL, and SQL databases in Microsoft Fabric, including tables, indexes, constraints, and specialized table types.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/design-implement-database-objects/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Design and implement database objects with SQL

lessons.title: Implement programmability objects with SQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement views, stored procedures, functions, and triggers in SQL Server to encapsulate logic, improve code reusability, and enforce business rules.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-programmability-objects/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Write advanced T-SQL code
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to write advanced T-SQL code including CTEs, window functions, JSON functions, regular expressions, fuzzy string matching, graph queries, correlated queries, and error handling.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/write-advanced-sql-code/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Implement SQL solutions by using AI-assisted tools
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use GitHub Copilot and Fabric Copilot for AI-assisted database development on Microsoft SQL platforms, including SQL Server, Azure SQL, and Microsoft Fabric.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/design-implement-sql-solutions-ai-assisted-tools/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement SQL solutions by using AI-assisted tools

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Design and develop database solutions
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Design and develop database solutions**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
